labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532283 ($1,934,991,358) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532283 ($5,782,489,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $232,808 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532283); class <5: 166 firms, avg revenue/firm $410,590 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $123,177 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 88 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,138,568 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $341,570 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 81 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,477,457 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $743,237 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 89 firms, avg revenue/firm $7,196,753 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,159,026 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 32 firms, avg revenue/firm $17,216,125 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,164,838 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 29 firms, avg revenue/firm $145,587,448 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $43,676,234 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 121
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
